# Tungsten Rod

## Relic Text

- Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- High value with repeated small HP-loss cards and multi-hit enemy chip, but its shop price can crowd out removal and potions.
